# n8n Alternatives Without Source Notes

## Quick Answer
This fixture includes an answer block, internal links, and FAQ structure, but it should fail because it does not carry enough source-derived notes for SEO, AEO, and GEO readiness.

## Comparison Table
| Tool | Best fit | Watchout |

| n8n | Flexible logic | More setup |
| Zapier | Easy adoption | Higher recurring cost |

Choose based on operator skill, cost tolerance, and workflow depth.

Zapier is often the quickest option for non-technical teams.
